basic_details.job_title: Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Anna University Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 24 April 2026 on the official website of Anna University. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AU Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: B.E / B.Tech in Materials Science & Engineering / Metallurgical Engineering / Manufacturing Engineering / Mechanical Engineering / Production Engineering (OR / AND) M.E / M.Tech in Materials Science & Engineering / Metallurgical Engineering / Manufacturing Engineering / Mechanical Engineering / other Closely Relevant Degree Specialization

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Anna University to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Anna University Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Project Assistant position at Anna University is 15-05-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Assistant post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000/- Per Month.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a B.E/B.Tech or M.E/M.Tech degree in specific engineering disciplines like Materials Science, Metallurgical, Manufacturing, or Mechanical Engineering.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official Anna University website on or before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, the official notification states that there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST).

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves a Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Project Assistant position is a contract-based role.

faq.question: Q8. Where is Anna University located?
faq.answer: Anna University is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age relaxations mentioned for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify any age limits or relaxations for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is CMRG / eoffice E-671131/068.
